---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability or API change.
title: ''
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Concrete scenario beats abstract preference.

## Proposed solution

Describe the API shape you want. Include type signatures or a code sample of the call site.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you try, and why did you reject them?

## Impact on public surface

Does this require a breaking change? A new export? A change to existing types? Be explicit.

## Additional context

Links, related issues, and any examples of how other libraries (React, Vue, Solid, etc.) solve the same problem.
